category.scope_note: Corded and cordless hand-held, transportable, and garden power tools exported from China to Kazakhstan under EAEU and Customs Union technical-regulation routes.

title.en: China-to-Kazakhstan Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入哈萨克斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入哈薩克斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Informational comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Kazakhstan EAEU and Customs Union electrical safety, EMC, market-access, noise, RoHS-style substances, and battery requirements.
description.zh: 中国电动工具常见合规基础与哈萨克斯坦 EAEU 及海关联盟电气安全、电磁兼容、市场准入、噪声、RoHS 式限用物质和电池要求的信息性对照。
description.zht: 中國電動工具常見合規基礎與哈薩克斯坦 EAEU 及海關聯盟電氣安全、電磁相容、市場准入、噪聲、RoHS 式限用物質和電池要求的資訊性對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited-body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, telecom approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Kazakhstan, EAEU, TR CU, TR EAEU, KazInSt, Gosstandart, and telecom authority practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准、电信批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行哈萨克斯坦、EAEU、TR CU、TR EAEU、KazInSt、Gosstandart 及电信主管机关实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准、電信批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行哈薩克斯坦、EAEU、TR CU、TR EAEU、KazInSt、Gosstandart 及電信主管機關實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made corded or cordless power tools entering Kazakhstan, the mandatory baseline is EAEU or Customs Union conformity under TR CU 004/2011 for low-voltage electrical safety, TR CU 020/2011 for EMC, TR EAEU 037/2016 for RoHS-style hazardous-substance restrictions, and EAC marking through accredited declaration or certification; GOST IEC 60745 or 62841 and GOST IEC 62133 for cells are common technical routes.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入哈萨克斯坦，强制基线是按 TR CU 004/2011 低压电气安全、TR CU 020/2011 电磁兼容、TR EAEU 037/2016 RoHS 式有害物质限制完成 EAEU 或海关联盟合格评定，并通过认可的声明或认证加贴 EAC 标志；GOST IEC 60745 或 62841 以及电芯 GOST IEC 62133 是常见技术路径。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入哈薩克斯坦，強制基線是按 TR CU 004/2011 低壓電氣安全、TR CU 020/2011 電磁相容、TR EAEU 037/2016 RoHS 式有害物質限制完成 EAEU 或海關聯盟合格評定，並通過認可的聲明或認證加貼 EAC 標誌；GOST IEC 60745 或 62841 以及電芯 GOST IEC 62133 是常見技術路徑。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must keep official or regulator-linked sources, access date, verified flag, and Kazakhstan-specific target-market wording before publication review.
